violations.text: Various foods were observed held at 52-63 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Prep unit was not in good repair, ambient was 48F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Cream cheese and deli meats was observed held at 46-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Inspector observed stacked foods, indicating blocked air flow. PIC moved foods to other unit at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Establishment is lacking sanitizer for 3 bay sink. Per interview with PIC, dispenser will be installed tomorrow. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
At time of inspection, reach in freezer (2 dr) was in poor repair. Ambient was observed at 98 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The wall behind the ice machine is in poor repair, observed hole with exposed insulation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
